pages.text:
got a prescription off David.

Sunday milled around, chatted. Lunch in Dolphin garden. Lovely watching children. [?Ptr] Thomas has a large tent. Took Conta & Wanda to station. Simon suddenly suggested visiting Pernille & Kit.

Hamburgers on the way home. Junct 6 blocked so got off onto M42 & past airport & Chad. Home at 10.

__Wed 16th Aug__
Simon, Eve, Tinder left 86 at 10. Off to farm & then camping with John & Kay to celebrate John's 30th birthday on Saturday. It's Simon's second to last visit to look at the new hop barn before the hop harvest begins on Aug 31st. He & William worked on the zig-zagging conveyor belts with Chris & 2 other Polish workmen. Bryony was out singing - a choir for tutoring choral conductors from all over the world. Eve
